title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Reiju, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're just humans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to say we're not good enough to eat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: THAT IS SO NOT THE PROBLEM HERE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An animal, a crocodile no less, dressed like a human spoke to us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that isn't the definition of weird and dangerous I don't know what is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You say that but... is that really something that should be freaking you out at this point?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Well... I guess you do kind of have a point there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I really think we should just trust pudding and wait near the coast for now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just look!! We've already lost the direct path back to our starting point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the bridge broke, big deal... we can go back whenever we want by just jumping over the river!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the... ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No >

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why are there two luffs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you just ask me who I was?! I'm Luffy, you dumbass!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! What's the meaning of this?! Which one is the real luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're both making the same exact movements and saying the same exact thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...But wait!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're slightly different!! The other luffy is like a reflection on a mirror...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of his features and details are the same, but just on the opposite side!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one on the other side... is a Luffy that none of us know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seriously does look like he's just acting a fool in front of a mirror!! What in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who are you ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: [...]please.] I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She's talking to you, Idiot! Answer her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys! I found Sanji! There he is again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Over there, on top of that tree!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji?! What are you doing all the way up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: SANJII! We came to take you back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where's pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, San...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're in my way!!!»

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OH NO! He's running away again!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SANJI!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why you little...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up and get out of the way!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
